# City Compare Project

A Next.js application for comparing cities by average income and cost of living.

## Project Setup

- [x] Next.js project initialized with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and App Router
- [x] Configuration files created (next.config.ts, tsconfig.json, tailwind.config.ts)
- [x] Dependencies configured in package.json

## Development Guidelines

- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Follow ESLint configuration for code quality
- Use Tailwind CSS for styling
- Next.js App Router for routing

## Running the Project

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

The application will be available at http://localhost:3000
